name: io.github.amitesh-m/wealthville
title: Wealthville
description: Solana + EVM liquidity-pool scores: Enter/Hold/Exit verdicts and 0-100 Wealthville Score.

environmentVariables.name: WEALTHVILLE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional free partner key for a higher rate limit (anonymous works at 60 req/min)

environmentVariables.name: WEALTHVILLE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default https://wealthville.net)
